understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to get a pushable block onto a goal tile marked with '+' on the semantic grid. Each level had a specific target position where a block needed to be placed to achieve WIN condition.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement works on a 3-pixel grid system where pieces move in cardinal directions. Some objects are pushable blocks that move when adjacent pieces push into them. Walls block movement and cannot be passed through. Selection works via CLICK with pixel coordinates matching the game's coordinate system. The game provides movement hints (left/right/up/down_blocked) but these are not absolute guarantees. I ran out of steps before completing the puzzle, suggesting I needed a more optimal path or better understanding of which block to move and where to push it to reach the goal tile.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to get a pushable block onto a goal tile marked with '+' on the semantic grid. Each level had a specific target position where a block needed to be placed to achieve WIN condition.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement works on a 3-pixel grid system where pieces move in cardinal directions. Some objects are pushable blocks that move when adjacent pieces push into them. Walls block movement and cannot be passed through. Selection works via CLICK with pixel coordinates matching the game's coordinate system. The game provides movement hints (left/right/up/down_blocked) but these are not absolute guarantees.
